SNECKO-AMASS.description:
Gain {CalculatedBlock:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Gains additional [gold]Block[/gold] equal to the total {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} cost of your hand.
SNECKO-AMASS.title: Amass
SNECKO-BEHOLD.title: Behold!
SNECKO-BELITTLE.description:
Enemy loses {ExtraDamage:diff()} HP for each unique debuff they have.
[gold]Gift[/gold]: Uncommon Debuff.
SNECKO-BELITTLE.title: Belittle
SNECKO-BEYOND_ARMOR.title: Beyond Armor
SNECKO-BLUNDERBUS.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Repeat for every 3+ cost card in hand.
SNECKO-BLUNDERBUS.title: Blunderbus
SNECKO-BLUNDER_GUARD.description: Whenever you play a card that costs 3+, gain {BlunderGuardPower:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] and {BlunderGuardTwoPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
SNECKO-BLUNDER_GUARD.title: Blunder Guard
SNECKO-CHEAP_STOCK.description: At the start of your turn, [gold]Muddle[/gold] the {CheapStockPower:plural:|{CheapStockPower:diff()} }highest cost {CheapStockPower:plural:card|cards} in your hand
SNECKO-CHEAP_STOCK.title: Cheap Stock
SNECKO-COBRA_COIL.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Enemy takes {CobraCoilPower:diff()} damage at the end of each of its turns.
[gold]Gift[/gold]: Rare Attack.
SNECKO-COBRA_COIL.title: Cobra Coil
SNECKO-COMBO_STRING.description:
Deal {CalculationExtra:diff()} damage for each [gold]Offclass[/gold] card played this turn.
[gold]Gift[/gold]: Uncommon.
SNECKO-COMBO_STRING.title: Combo String
SNECKO-COWER.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Add a [gold]Hole Up[/gold]{IfUpgraded:show:[gold]+[/gold]|} to your hand.
SNECKO-COWER.title: Cower
SNECKO-CRYSTAL_BOOMERANG.description:
Put a card from the discard pile into your hand.
If it's [gold]Offclass[/gold], gain {Block:diff()} Block.
SNECKO-CRYSTAL_BOOMERANG.title: Crystal Boomerang
SNECKO-DANGER_NOODLE.title: Danger Noodle
SNECKO-DECEPTION.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Add a [gold]Shockwave[/gold] to your hand.
SNECKO-DECEPTION.title: Deception
SNECKO-DEFEND_SNECKO.title: Defend
SNECKO-DEFENSIVE_FLAIR.description:
Gain {CalculatedBlock:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold],
increased by {CalculationExtra:diff()} for each [gold]Offclass[/gold] card in your hand.
[gold]Gift[/gold]: Uncommon.
SNECKO-DEFENSIVE_FLAIR.title: Defensive Flair
SNECKO-DICE_BLOCK.title: Dice Block
SNECKO-DICE_BOULDER.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Increase this card's [gold]Block[/gold] by {BlockIncrease:diff()} and cost by {Energy:energyIcons()} this combat.
SNECKO-DICE_BOULDER.title: Dice Boulder
SNECKO-DICE_CRUSH.title: Dice Crush
SNECKO-DISCOUNT_SALE.title: Discount Sale
SNECKO-DRAGONS_HOARD.title: Dragon's Hoard
SNECKO-EXOTIC_FORM.title: Exotic Form
SNECKO-FINAL_STRIKE.title: Final Strike
SNECKO-FLASH_IN_THE_PAN.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Discard your hand.
Draw that many cards next turn.
SNECKO-FLASH_IN_THE_PAN.title: Flash in the Pan
SNECKO-FOUNTAIN.title: Fountain
SNECKO-GILDED_SHIELD.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
[gold]Muddle[/gold] this, then return it to your hand.
SNECKO-GILDED_SHIELD.title: Gilded Shield
SNECKO-GLITTERING_GAMBIT.title: Glittering Gambit
SNECKO-INERT_BLADE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If this costs...
1+: Draw {InertBladePower:diff()} cards.
2+: Gain {InertBladePower:diff()} Strength.
3+: Gain {IfUpgraded:show:{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} |}{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
SNECKO-INERT_BLADE.title: Inert Blade
SNECKO-IRON_FANG.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage and apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] to ALL enemies.
SNECKO-IRON_FANG.title: Iron Fang
SNECKO-JACKPOT.title: Jackpot
SNECKO-LACERATE.description:
Apply {VenomPower:diff()} [gold]Venom[/gold] to ALL enemies.
Gain a [gold]Deathbringer{IfUpgraded:show:+|}[/gold].
SNECKO-LACERATE.title: Lacerate
SNECKO-LASER_EYES.title: Laser Eyes
SNECKO-LATCH_ON.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Add a [gold]Viper Essence[/gold] to your hand.
SNECKO-LATCH_ON.title: Latch On
SNECKO-LIL_GUARDIAN.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Whenever you play a card that costs 2 or more, play this from your hand.
SNECKO-LIL_GUARDIAN.title: Lil' Guardian
SNECKO-LUCKY_BREAK.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} Block.
Draw {LuckyBreakPower:diff()} card for each 2+ cost card in hand.
SNECKO-LUCKY_BREAK.title: Lucky Break
SNECKO-MAKESHIFT_BLADE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If the target has at least {Debuffs:diff()} debuffs, draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
[gold]Gift[/gold]: Debuff.
SNECKO-MAKESHIFT_BLADE.title: Makeshift Blade
SNECKO-MARKED_CARD.description:
[gold]Muddle[/gold] {Muddle:plural:a card|{Muddle:diff()} cards}.
It will always be cheaper.
SNECKO-MARKED_CARD.title: Marked Card
SNECKO-MEDUSA.title: Medusa
SNECKO-MESMERIZE.title: Mesmerize
SNECKO-MINT_CONDITION.title: Mint Condition
SNECKO-MUD_SHIELD.description: Whenever you [gold]Muddle a card[/gold], gain {MudShieldPower:diff()} Block.
SNECKO-MUD_SHIELD.title: Mud Shield
SNECKO-NOPE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] a card.
If it had a color, gain a random card of the same class.
SNECKO-NOPE.title: Nope
SNECKO-OTHERWORLDLY_SLASH.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If you played an [gold]Offclass[/gold] card this turn, deal {Damage:diff()} damage again.
[gold]Gift[/gold]: Common.
SNECKO-OTHERWORLDLY_SLASH.title: Otherworldly Slash
SNECKO-OVERWHELMING.description: The first time you play an [gold]Offclass[/gold] card each turn, draw a card.
SNECKO-OVERWHELMING.title: Overwhelming
SNECKO-PERPETUAL_SERPENT.title: Perpetual Serpent
SNECKO-POWER_SHOT.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Whenever you play a Power, return this from the discard pile to your hand.
SNECKO-POWER_SHOT.title: Power Shot
SNECKO-QUEEN_OF_PENTACLES.title: Queen Of Pentacles
SNECKO-QUICK_MOVE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} Block.
[gold]Overflow[/gold]:
Apply {VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to ALL enemies.
SNECKO-QUICK_MOVE.title: Quick Move
SNECKO-RAIN_OF_DICE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Muddle[/gold] a card.
Add [gold]Rain of Dice{IfUpgraded:show:+|}[/gold] to your hand.
SNECKO-RAIN_OF_DICE.title: Rain of Dice
SNECKO-RESTOCK.description:
Discard your hand.
Draw {RestockPower:diff()} cards, then [gold]Muddle your hand[/gold].
Exhaust.
SNECKO-RESTOCK.title: Restock
SNECKO-RISKY_SWORD.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} Damage.
When [gold]Muddled[/gold], increase this card's damage by {DamageIncrease:diff()} for this combat.
SNECKO-RISKY_SWORD.title: Risky Sword
SNECKO-ROUNDABOUT_SWING.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Put a card in hand on top of your draw pile.
Draw {RoundaboutSwingPower:diff()} additional cards next turn.
SNECKO-ROUNDABOUT_SWING.title: Roundabout Swing
SNECKO-SAVE_FOR_LATER.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Retain[/gold] {SaveForLaterPower:diff()} {SaveForLaterPower:plural:card|cards} at the end of your turn.
SNECKO-SAVE_FOR_LATER.title: Save For Later
SNECKO-SERPENTINE_SLEUTH.description:
Ethereal.
Whenever you play a Power, gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
[gold]Gift[/gold]: Rare Power.
SNECKO-SERPENTINE_SLEUTH.title: Serpentine Sleuth
SNECKO-SERPENTSCALE.title: Serpentscale
SNECKO-SERPENTS_NEST.description:
Whenever you play a Power, deal {SerpentsNestPower:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
[gold]Gift[/gold]: Uncommon Power.
SNECKO-SERPENTS_NEST.title: Serpent's Nest
SNECKO-SERPENT_IDOL.description:
Choose 1 of {SerpentIdolPower:diff()} random [gold]Offclass cards to gain[/gold]. It costs 0 this turn.
Exhaust.
SNECKO-SERPENT_IDOL.title: Serpent Idol
SNECKO-SHIFT.title: Shift
SNECKO-SLITHER_THROUGH.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Reduce the cost of [gold]Offclass cards in your hand by [/gold]{SlitherThroughPower:diff()} this turn.
[gold]Gift[/gold]: Uncommon.
SNECKO-SLITHER_THROUGH.title: Slither Through
SNECKO-SNAKE_EYES.description:
This turn, your next {IfUpgraded:show:2 |}[gold]Offclass {IfUpgraded:show:cards|card} {IfUpgraded:show:are|is} played twice[/gold].
[gold]Gift[/gold]: Rare Skill.
SNECKO-SNAKE_EYES.title: Snake Eyes
SNECKO-SNAKE_RAKE.title: Snake Rake
SNECKO-SNEK_BITE.title: Snek Bite
SNECKO-SOUL_EXCHANGE.title: Soul Exchange
SNECKO-SOUL_ROLL.description:
Retain.
Gain {Block:diff()} Block.
[gold]Muddle a card[/gold].
Exhaust.
SNECKO-SOUL_ROLL.title: Soul Roll
SNECKO-STRIKE_SNECKO.title: Strike
SNECKO-TAIL_WHIP.title: Tail Whip
SNECKO-THROWING_CARDS.title: Throwing Cards
SNECKO-TOOTH_AND_CLAW.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Gain {IfUpgraded:show:an Upgraded|a} Shiv for each unique color in your hand.
[gold]Gift[/gold]: Uncommon.
SNECKO-TOOTH_AND_CLAW.title: Tooth And Claw
SNECKO-TRASH_CAN.description: At the end of your turn, you may Exhaust a card.
SNECKO-TRASH_CAN.title: Trash Can
SNECKO-TRASH_TO_TREASURE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} Block.
Exhaust a card.
Gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} equal to its cost.{IfUpgraded:show:|
Exhaust.}
SNECKO-TRASH_TO_TREASURE.title: Trash to Treasure
SNECKO-TSUNAMI.title: Tsunami
SNECKO-TYPHOON_FANG.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Overflow[/gold]: This turn, whenever you [gold]Overflow[/gold], play a copy of this card.
SNECKO-TYPHOON_FANG.title: Typhoon Fang
SNECKO-UNENDING_SUPPLY.description:
{IfUpgraded:show:Innate.
|}At the start of each turn, gain an [gold]Echo of a random sneckomod[/gold]:Offclass card.
SNECKO-UNENDING_SUPPLY.title: Unending Supply
SNECKO-WHACK.title: Whack!
SNECKO-WIDE_ANGLE.description:
Retain.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
SNECKO-WIDE_ANGLE.title: Wide Angle
SNECKO-WIDE_STING.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Upgrade all [gold]Offclass[/gold] cards in your hand.
[gold]Gift[/gold]: Common.
SNECKO-WIDE_STING.title: Wide Sting
SNECKO-HOLE_UP.title: Hole Up
SNECKO-CRYSTAL_BOOMERANG.selectionScreen: Select card to put into your hand.
